headline: Faster dashboard, streamlined onboarding, and clearer API docs—directly addressing your top feedback from Q2.

themes.user_facing_summary: We've tackled the #1 complaint from your Q2 NPS feedback: dashboard sluggishness. Dashboard load times are now 67% faster thanks to optimized database queries and Redis caching, while workspace member listing got a 30% speed boost for teams with 50+ members.
supporting_changes: Reduce dashboard p95 latency from 2.4s to 800ms via DB call batching
Add Redis caching layer to org-settings API
Eliminate N+1 query in workspace member listing endpoint

themes.user_facing_summary: Signup is now faster and clearer. We've cut the flow from 5 steps to 2, added guided tooltips on your first dashboard to highlight the metrics that matter most, and deferred optional details so you can get started immediately.
supporting_changes: Add inline tooltips on first-run dashboard for top 4 metrics
Defer non-essential profile fields to post-signup

themes.user_facing_summary: API integration is now smoother with clearer authentication documentation upfront, removing friction that was slowing down partner onboarding.
supporting_changes: Update API quickstart to reflect new auth model

notable_changes: Dashboard p95 latency cut from 2.4s to 800ms—directly addressing your Q2 #1 NPS complaint
Signup abandonment at step 3 eliminated by reducing flow from 5 steps to 2
Workspace member listing ~30% faster for teams with 50+ members
First-run dashboard now includes inline guidance for your most-used metrics
API authentication documentation completely rewritten for clarity
customer_voice: Your Q2 feedback showed three critical pain points: dashboard performance issues cited in our NPS survey, new users abandoning signup at step three, and friction around API authentication during integration. This release directly addresses all three.
